heading: Definitions
label: 1101 Definitions
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)1101(no source)A number of the source provisions of the chapter are taken from 49 App.:ch. 20. The text of 49 App.:ch. 20 contains general definitions, some of which are used in those source provisions.This section is included to ensure that the identical definitions that are relevant are used without repeating them. The source provisions for the definitions are found in the revision note for section 40102(a) of the revised title.

Amendments2025—Subsec. (b). substituted “Section 2101(24)” for “Section 2101(23)”.Pub. L. 119–602024— amended section generally. Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “ and apply to this chapter. In this chapter, the term ‘accident’ includes damage to or destruction of vehicles in surface or air transportation or pipelines, regardless of whether the initiating event is accidental or otherwise.”Pub. Definitions of Terms in Div. C ofPub. L. 115–254, , , provided that:Pub. L. 115–254, div. C, § 1102132 Stat. 3429Oct. 5, 2018“In this division [enacting , amending sections 1111, 1113, 1114, 1116 to 1118, 1131, 1134, 1136, 1138, 1139, 1154, 41113, and 41313 of this title, and enacting provisions set out as notes under sections 1116, 1119, and 40101 of this title], the following definitions apply:section 1140 of this title“(1).—BoardThe term ‘Board’ means the National Transportation Safety Board.“(2).—ChairmanThe term ‘Chairman’ means the Chairman of the National Transportation Safety Board.“(3).—Most wanted listThe term ‘Most Wanted List’ means the Board publication entitled ‘Most Wanted List’.”

children.heading: .—Accident
children.label: 1 .—Accident
children.text: The term “accident” includes damage to or destruction of vehicles in surface or air transportation or pipelines, regardless of whether the initiating event is accidental or otherwise.

children.heading: .—State
children.label: 2 .—State
children.text: The term “State” means a State of the United States, the District of Columbia, Puerto Rico, the Virgin Islands, American Samoa, the Northern Mariana Islands, and Guam.

children.heading: .—Applicability of Other Definitions
children.label: b .—Applicability of Other Definitions
children.text: Section 2101(24) of title 46 and shall apply to this chapter.1section 40102(a) of this titleSo in original. Probably should be “2101(25)”.1
